tree.name: Thomas Sorber
tree.tradeDescription: Drafted 15th overall by OKC using pick acquired from Miami Heat (Feb 9, 2022)
tree.note: Pick was MIA's own 2025 1st. OKC acquired it by trading a 2023 1st round pick (became Jaime Jaquez Jr. #18) and a 2026 2nd round pick to Miami for KZ Okpala and this pick.

assetsGivenUp.name: KZ Okpala
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Miami along with 2025 1st (Sorber) for a 2023 1st (Jaime Jaquez Jr.) and 2026 2nd round pick
assetsGivenUp.note: OKC waived Okpala shortly after. The real asset was the 2025 1st round pick.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 1st Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: OKC's own 2023 1st round pick, traded to Miami. Became #18 overall (Jaime Jaquez Jr.)
assetsGivenUp.note: OKC traded their own future 1st to acquire MIA's 2025 1st — a bet on Miami declining.
